pi_items.verified_value: ODB file modification via ZIP extraction and HSQLDB script manipulation
pi_items.source: Verified in setup_task.sh: the script extracts the ODB (which is a ZIP file), modifies the internal HSQLDB script file at database/script, inserts SQL statements, and repackages the ODB

pi_items.verified_value: Chinook sample database (public, official repository: github.com/lerocha/chinook-database)
pi_items.source: Verified that chinook.odb is restored from /opt/libreoffice_base_samples/chinook.odb (per task_utils.sh restore_chinook_odb function). The Chinook database is a widely used public sample database for SQL training

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the Chinook database, a publicly available SQL training sample database with 59 original customers, 412 invoices, and 2240 invoice lines. Data is synthetic (artificially injected): three duplicate customer records (IDs 60-62) are inserted with valid customer information, two orphan invoices (IDs 413-414) referencing non-existent customers (99-100), and three orphan invoice line records (IDs 2241-2243) referencing the orphan invoices. The database file is modified via ODB ZIP extraction and HSQLDB script manipulation before task execution.
